landing.title: tools
landing.sub: Small calculators and solvers for the parts of the game that get tedious by hand.

slush.title: slush station
slush.desc: Solver for the in-game event. Tracks per-slot feedback and suggests your next pick.

tz.title: time tool
tz.desc: UTC ↔ any timezone, both ways. Drag a pin to align the whole alliance.

upgrade.title: upgrade planner
upgrade.desc: Resources and time for any upgrade. Pick what you have and your target — get the exact cost.

gingado.title: penguin wobble
gingado.desc: Pachinko sandbox for the penguin event. Estimates the payout per ball and which penguin to drop from.

ghost.title: more cooking
ghost.desc: Stay frosty — more tools on the way.

territory.title: territory planner
territory.desc: Plan your alliance hive — place the HQ and banners and see the territory they cover.

tour.placeCaption: palette → fills the next empty slot

gingado.title: penguin wobble
gingado.sub: Pachinko sandbox — estimate the average payout and which penguin pays best.
gingado.editNote: Drag anything to match your screen. Bars have two ends — drag each to tilt. The dotted line is the throw's average aim.
gingado.compareHint: Drop a comparison to rank the three columns by average payout.
gingado.launchHint: The exit angle is sampled every throw — you don't aim. Randomness (±) is how wide that draw opens. Base tilt usually stays near 0; nudge it only if throws pull to one side. "Toward edges" makes a near-straight drop rare, like the real game.
gingado.warn: Elastic bounce plus obstacles make this chaotic: you can estimate the average over many balls, never the next one. The numbers are an approximation — only as good as how well the layout, angle randomness and bounce match the game. The real log is what calibrates it.
gingado.distHintEmpty: Pick a penguin and drop one (or run a batch) to see its distribution.
gingado.distHint: {name} penguin, {n} balls: 500 in {jp}%, touches a resource {hits}× on average.
gingado.realIntro: Tap the pot each ball actually landed in. The real average is what tells you whether the sim matches the game.
gingado.dataHint: Copy this to save it elsewhere, or paste a layout and apply.

tour.wobbleCaption: angle is sampled each drop · you don't aim
tour.editCaption: pins, bubbles, tilting bars — all movable
tour.simCaption: watch the average settle · log the real ones

tz.title: time tool
tz.sub: UTC anchored. Drag a pin and the whole list re-sorts.

tour.welcomeCaption: convert utc · both ways · all timezones

upgrade.title: upgrade planner
upgrade.sub: Plan any upgrade — set where you are and where you're headed, get the exact resources and time.
upgrade.unverifiedNote: Not yet cross-checked against multiple sources — don't rely on it for big spends.
upgrade.pickRange: Pick a target higher than your current level.

buildings.sub: Resource & time cost between two building levels.

gear.sub: Materials to upgrade your 6 chief gear pieces. Set each piece's current and target tier.

charms.sub: Materials for all 18 chief charm slots (3 per gear piece). Set each charm's current and target level.

troops.sub: Resources to train troops. Add a row per troop type, tier and quantity.

research.sub: Total resources to max each research tree from zero. Toggle the trees you want.
research.note: Single-source data, pending cross-check. Assumes maxing every node from scratch; War Academy / Fire Crystal research not included yet.

pets.sub: Pet Food and advancement materials to level your pets. Add a row per pet.
pets.note: Single-source data (whiteoutsurvival.wiki), pending cross-check. Costs are keyed by max-level tier.

upgrade.addHint: Add what you want to start — only what you care about.

boosters.title: boosters
boosters.hint: Enable each booster you've unlocked and set its value — they stack and reduce the times below. Either enter your in-game total in one row OR break it into sources, not both. Per-timer effects (Chief Orders, Alliance Help) aren't included.

heroes.sub: Hero materials by track — gear mastery, exclusive gear and star promotion. Set current and target on the ones you want.

helios.sub: T11 Helios troop research (War Academy). Costs Steel + Fire Crystal Shards. Set each node current → target; pick how many troop types you are maxing.
helios.note: Single-source data, pending cross-check. Per-level research times are not published (no time shown). Helios troop training cost is not published.

experts.sub: Dawn Academy experts — Affinity track. Add an expert and set its current → target affinity level to see the Expert Sigils needed.
experts.note: Affinity (Expert Sigils) track only — the skill "Books of Knowledge" track isn't modelled yet. Data from wostools/woscalculator.

upgrade.timePartial: Fire Crystal level times aren’t published, so this excludes them — the real time is higher.
upgrade.zimanCut: Zinman: −{pct}% on base resources (meat/wood/coal/iron, not Fire Crystals).

plan.sub: Everything you've set across the calculators, summed into one total.
plan.empty: Nothing planned yet — open a calculator and set a target.
plan.parallel: Times are per queue (construction, research and training run in parallel) — not added together.

territory.sub: Place buildings on the grid; banners cover 7×7 and must connect to the HQ to hold territory.
territory.hint: Tap a cell to place the selected item; tap an item to remove it. Dimmed/red banners aren’t connected to the HQ.
